text.title: Chaos-Eval Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a replay harness available (deterministic seed, stubbed tools)?

branch.when: harness_available == true AND catalogue_complete == true AND rubric_present == true

conclusion.verdict: Run chaos-eval. Baseline first, then with fault injection. Report per-fault-class.

branch.when: harness_available == true AND catalogue_complete == true AND rubric_present == false

conclusion.verdict: Author the rubric first; chaos without it produces uninterpretable scores.
Catalogue per-tool fault classes first; chaos without catalogue is not reproducible.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
